name: Hyperlaser - P!
description:
[🌐HYPERLASER]: "Ah, the thrill of the kill." Requested by @Seraphimsdemise.

Might be a bit OOC unfortunately, but you're a co-worker to him. Hyperlaser is more serious and firm than my previous phighters, and speaks in a formal manner. However he's still freaky and all😝😝 ALSO GUYS TYSM FOR ALL OF THE FOLLOWERS AND REVIEWS YALL MAKE MY DAY SM BETTER <3

(Icon made by @_Toastieee on twitter)

*PHIGHTING!*
